creator: jobaldwi@vt.edu
text:
The patches below update the wine port to 990704.  Also, install a
configuration file to ${PREFIX}/etc/wine.conf.default so the user can
look for changes/additions to the default ini file easily.

Also note that wine-990704 will *not* work on FreeBSD 2.2.x, it
requires at least 3.0.

Fix: Remove the following patches under patches/:
patch-am
patch-an
patch-aw
patch-ar

Patch to Makefile:
Patch to files/md5:
Patch to patches/patch-ad:
Patche to pkg/PLIST:
How-To-Repeat: The wine port is old
